description: Celebrate diversity and inclusion with an engaging newsletter that showcases the vibrancy of the LGBTQ community. This email layout, designed for contemporary dark mode viewing, features a harmonious blend of rainbow colors, symbolizing pride. Perfect for sharing media content, especially podcast episodes that amplify the voices within the LGBTQ community. It's an ideal choice for media and entertainment platforms seeking to promote diverse content during Pride Month. This template also supports activism initiatives, fostering an environment of acceptance and understanding. Experience the power of diversity in entertainment with this visually appealing and thought-provoking email layout.
short_description: Celebrate diversity with this dark mode email template, perfect for sharing LGBTQ podcasts. Promote diverse content during Pride Month with this media and entertainment layout. Ideal for activism initiatives, experience the power of diversity in entertainment.

designer.description: I am Héctor "Titus" Ruiz, a Peruvian designer based in the Canary Islands. I'm focused on Brand Identity Design and UI Design. I help companies build brands, discovering their true potential through a research-based design process, creating an impactful identity.
